content: buildCommandMining (src/runs/analytics/command-mining.ts, warren-8976/pl-ad0f step 7) is the pure aggregator for GET /analytics/behavior. Takes ToolEventRow[] (handler maps EventsRepo.listToolEventsForRuns rows to {runId,kind,seq,payload}). generalizeCommand collapses raw commands to a binary+subcommand signature (git/gh/sd/ml/bun etc.), using the trailing &&-segment and stripping sudo/env/flags so 'bun check:all'=='bun run check:all'. Only tool_use rows carrying payload.input.command (or payload.command) are mined; structured tools count in totals.toolUses only. is_error joins tool_result->tool_use via tool_use_id per run. retries=re-invocation of a command already failed earlier in the same run; stuckScore=retries that failed again. isOsEcoCommand flags ml/sd/gh + 'bun run check:*'. Outputs byFrequency/byFailures/byStuckScore(retries>0)/osEcoCommands/byCategory, deterministically sorted.
